OPPOSITION OF HAYWARD WONG AND JUDY WONG FAMILY TRUST TO ANDERSON GLASS COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HAYWARD WONG & JUDY WONG FAMILY TRUST (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS HAYWARD WONG & JUDY WONG)
DECLARATION OF ALAN E. GREENBERG IN OPPOS TO MOTION FOR GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HAYWARD WONG & JUDY WONG FAMILY TRUST (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS HAYWARD WONG & JUDY WONG)

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ANDERSON GLASS COMPANY'S MOTION FOR GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT DETERMINATION IS GRANTED. THE SETTLEMENT IS REASONABLE GIVEN EVIDENCE SHOWING PLAINTIFF IS UNLIKELY TO BE ABLE TO PROVE LIABILITY OR CAUSATION AS TO THIS DEFENDANT, GIVEN THE WEAKNESSES IN PLAINTIFF'S MEDICAL CAUSATION AND DAMAGES EVIDENCE, GIVEN EARLY RESOLUTION, AND GIVEN EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT LACKS RESOURCES TO RESPOND TO A SIGNIFICANT JUDGMENT. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination
Off Calendar Jun-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT ANDERSON GLASS COMPANY'S Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination IS GRANTED. THE SETTLEMENT IS REASONABLE GIVEN EVIDENCE SHOWING PLAINTIFF IS UNLIKELY TO BE ABLE TO PROVE LIABILITY OR CAUSATION AS TO THIS DEFENDANT, GIVEN THE WEAKNESSES IN PLAINTIFF'S MEDICAL CAUSATION AND DAMAGES EVIDENCE, GIVEN EARLY RESOLUTION, AND GIVEN EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT LACKS RESOURCES TO RESPOND TO A SIGNIFICANT JUDGMENT. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 = (301/PJB)
